name: conductor-harness
description: Always-on goal loop for Claude Code: a Stop hook that keeps the agent working while its focused Keyoku goal is unconverged and budget allows, plus a PreToolUse policy gate (autonomy x budget x action-class). Reads Keyoku and tokenroom state files; never spawns their processes. NOTE: 'conductor-harness' is a placeholder name — final npm name TBD; private until named.
